basics.summary: Chemical Engineering graduate and Materials Researcher with a strong foundation in electrochemistry, process optimization, and computational workflows. Experienced in bridging experimental material characterization with Python/MATLAB-driven data analysis. Seeking Master's programs in Materials, Energy, or Chemical Engineering at German universities for Summer 2027.
